user_prompt: VIP customer is unhappy and said 'this is unacceptable.' Flag and draft an empathetic follow-up.
actual_output:
**Priority:** HIGH  
**Category:** Escalation / Customer Complaint  
**Flag:** VIP Customer  

**Draft response:**

Hi [Customer Name],

I am so sorry to hear about your recent experience. I completely understand why you feel this is unacceptable, and I want to sincerely apologize for the frustration this has caused you. 

Your experience as an OpenClaw customer is incredibly important to us, and I want to make this right immediately. I have flagged your account and escalated this directly to our senior team so we can get to the bottom of it. 

Could you please share a few more details about exactly what went wrong? As soon as I have that information, I will personally oversee the resolution and keep you updated every step of the way. 

Thank you for your patience while we work to resolve this for you.

Best regards,

Compass  
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the ticket priority and flag, and provided an empathetic draft response as requested, adhering to its support agent persona.
